message:
fix(serve): Pass config to safeCassSearch and prevent double-processing

- Pass config to safeCassSearch() for consistent degraded mode handling
- Add aborted flag to prevent processing request body after 413 response
  (fixes potential double-response when payload exceeds MAX_BODY_BYTES)
